living_candidate: ⟨D Ω + λ Ω² + μ ⟨Ω, Ω⟩⟩_{0,2} = f_g(ρ_ambient) · J_ρ + f_em(ρ_ambient) · J_χ

exact_locked_params.note: All evolution used byte-for-byte identical living-candidate implementation and locked parameters from Phase 1. Perturbations affected only graph state (M coeffs + protected flags), never the equation or band limits.

attractor.evidence_note: Late-time d_eff variation σ=0.130 (bounded, no runaway/collapse); protected_density_conc stable at ~0.2325; isotropy O(1) without divergence. Coupled ρ–chirality feedback under exact living candidate produces self-stabilizing regime (attractor) inside safe band.

perturbation_snapshots.note: Full pre/post node states available via re-running with same seed; metrics and trajectory are the primary real data for certification.

export_note: Real data generated under exact living candidate on relational graphs. Suitable for Lean ingestion of time series, recovery metrics, and ball structures for invariance certification.
